$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/spinner/spinner.tsx — a Loader2 icon at size-4 with animate-spin. The 1s linear rotation is Tailwind's built-in animate-spin, not a brand motion token; only the size is ours.

size.$description: size-4 — callers override for larger spinners.

duration.$description: Tailwind's animate-spin (1s linear infinite). NOT motion.duration.base (200ms) — a loop, not a transition.

inherit.$description: DEFAULT. The spinner takes the text colour of whatever it sits in — a button, a row, a cell. A spinner that is part of something else should not announce itself.

primary.$description: Brand teal. For a spinner that stands ALONE and IS the content of the moment — a page still loading, an empty panel waiting on data. Use it sparingly: if three spinners on one screen are all teal, none of them means anything.

on-brand.$description: White — a spinner sitting ON a filled brand surface (inside a primary button while it submits).
